mapper.select: SELECT payment_id as paymentId, order_id as orderId, card_id as cardId, payment_method as paymentMethod, pg_tid as pgTid, approval_number as approvalNumber, amount, payment_status as paymentStatus, decline_reason as declineReason, idempotency_key as idempotencyKey, approved_at as approvedAt, cancelled_at as cancelledAt, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM Payments WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId}

SELECT payment_id as paymentId, order_id as orderId, card_id as cardId, payment_method as paymentMethod, pg_tid as pgTid, approval_number as approvalNumber, amount, payment_status as paymentStatus, decline_reason as declineReason, idempotency_key as idempotencyKey, approved_at as approvedAt, cancelled_at as cancelledAt, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM Payments WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY payment_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT p.payment_id as paymentId, p.order_id as orderId, p.card_id as cardId, p.payment_method as paymentMethod, p.pg_tid as pgTid, p.approval_number as approvalNumber, p.amount, p.payment_status as paymentStatus, p.decline_reason as declineReason, p.idempotency_key as idempotencyKey, p.approved_at as approvedAt, p.cancelled_at as cancelledAt, p.created_at as createdAt, p.updated_at as updatedAt FROM Payments p JOIN Orders o ON p.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY p.payment_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Payments (order_id, card_id, payment_method, pg_tid, approval_number, amount, payment_status, decline_reason, idempotency_key, approved_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{cardId}, #{paymentMethod}, #{pgTid}, #{approvalNumber}, #{amount}, #{paymentStatus}, #{declineReason}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{approvedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE Payments SET payment_status = #{status}, decline_reason = #{declineReason}, cancelled_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'CANCELLED' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE cancelled_at END WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId}
